title: 皐月賞の後に・鬼、炸裂

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The intense race is over, and Winning Ticket,
having been unable to achieve victory, shows her
frustration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, she is worried about the mounting
threat of Narita Taishin and her fierce sprinting
ability.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shaking off her uneasiness, Ticket forces herself
to focus squarely on the Japanese Derby, where
she can't afford to lose.
